_comment: Manual (LLM) translation pass: per song slug, exact original line -> English line. Applied by build_site.py wherever the automatic merge left a line untranslated (or to correct a bad pairing). The nuevayol entry is a real example from badbunny2026; entries whose slug is not in songs.py are ignored, so replace it at will.

nuevayol.Yo estoy en la mía, no tengo adversario,: I'm doing my own thing, I have no rival, no
nuevayol.Con Los Yankee' y Los Met', Juan Soto: With the Yankees and the Mets, Juan Soto
